memory.summary: On November 27th, during their interaction at the town hall, Andy and Peter made further plans for their AI project meeting the next day at Caroline's Café (now at 3 PM instead of the initial café), as Caroline will also be present. They decided to discuss their community garden and zine club plans with Mei during this meeting. Additionally, they agreed to collaborate with Samantha on her new AI musical project, setting up a meeting for the following Saturday at 4 PM after their park date. The final schedule includes Andy, Peter, Samantha, Noor, Mei, Diego, and potentially a discussion about Andy's gallery show dream.

data.content: Talked to Noor at hospital around 2025-11-27 18:00

Andy: Hey Noor, what a surprise running into you here! I was just thinking about our AI project and music collaboration with Peter and Samantha. How about we meet at Caroline's Café an hour from now to discuss everything?

Noor: Hi Andy, yes, I rescheduled our meeting there for today. I've even brought my laptop and some snacks for the students. Let's make it a double date under the oak tree over the weekend too. See you at 7!

(4 lines, specific to their relationship, plans made with a time and place)
Talked to Samantha at town_hall around 2025-11-27 19:00

Andy: Hey Samantha, it's great running into you here! I hope you don't mind me bringing up our AI project since we both seem to have some free time.

Samantha: Hi Andy, not at all! I was actually thinking about reaching out to discuss our progress. How about we meet at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 1 PM to continue our discussion over coffee? That way, we can catch up with Peter as well.

Andy: Perfect! I look forward to it. Let's make sure to bring our ideas and sketches for a productive meeting. See you then!
Talked to Peter at cafe around 2025-11-27 23:00

Andy: Hey Peter, didn't expect to run into you at the market! Looks like we're both heading to Caroline's Café tomorrow for our AI project meeting, right?

Peter: Surprisingly enough, yes! And it seems we've got a quadruple date with Noor, Mei, and Samantha there as well. How about an early coffee discussion under the oak tree around noon if that works for you?

Andy: That sounds perfect, Peter. See you then!

Peter: Great, looking forward to it, Andy. I've got a lot to discuss with everyone before our official meeting at 2 PM.
Talked to Noor at library around 2025-11-28 00:00

Andy: Hey Noor, I see you're here early too! Fancy meeting you at the library.

Noor: Hi Andy! It's always a pleasure. I was actually thinking about stopping by Caroline's Café tomorrow for lunch, and Diego suggested we could discuss our AI projects then. Would you like to join us?

Andy: That sounds great, Noor! Let's meet there at 1 PM sharp, so we can catch up before the AI project meeting at 2 PM. And perhaps I could bring some of my sketches to share.

Noor: That would be fantastic, Andy. I'm looking forward to seeing your work and discussing both projects together. Let's make it official – see you tomorrow at Caroline's Café at 1 PM.
Talked to Mei at theater around 2025-11-28 04:00

Andy: Hey Mei, it looks like we're both free tomorrow at 3 PM. How about we meet at Caroline's Café? I heard they have a lovely ambiance, perfect for our discussions.

Mei: That sounds delightful, Andy! I was thinking the same. It'll give us enough time to talk about our AI project and the community garden plans. I've even brought some seeds from my garden for sharing. See you there tomorrow!
Talked to Noor at cafe around 2025-11-28 07:00

Andy: Hey Noor, I ran into Peter at the town hall last night and we discussed our AI music project again. We're meeting at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 3 PM, would you like to join?

Noor: Absolutely, Andy! That sounds great. And since we've got a lot to catch up on, let's make it a double date under the oak tree this weekend too, right?

Andy: Perfect! I'll bring my sketchbook and some tea for both meetings. See you at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 3 PM sharp.

Noor: See you there, Andy. Don't forget your dented thermos! And bring your laptop too, we can discuss your gallery show dream as well.

memory.summary: On November 27th, Samantha met with Peter, Andy, and Diego to discuss their AI project at Caroline's Cafe on December 4th, as previously arranged under the oak tree. They also agreed to meet earlier at Caroline's Cafe at 9 AM sharp for coffee, suggested by Andy. The following day, she spoke with Caroline about their AI music project progress and discussed a potential gathering the next day at 2 PM, which Samantha agreed to attend. Additionally, on November 27th, Samantha had an impromptu meeting with Andy at the town hall around 7 PM, where he proposed they meet at Caroline's Café the following day at 1 PM for further discussion about their AI project and catch up with Peter.

data.content: Talked to Noor at museum around 2025-11-27 20:00

Samantha (taking off her noise-cancelling headphones): "Noor, it's a pleasant surprise to see you here."

Noor (smiling warmly and offering Samantha a snack): "Samantha! I didn't expect to run into you at the museum. How have you been?"

Samantha: "I've been well, thank you. It seems we both have an interest in artificial intelligence these days."

Noor: "Indeed, and it's great to collaborate with like-minded individuals! Let's catch up over coffee at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 1 PM sharp? I believe that gives us ample time to prepare for our meeting with Peter and the others."

Samantha: "That sounds perfect, Noor. See you then."
Talked to Diego at school around 2025-11-28 00:00

Samantha: Hey Diego, I wasn't expecting to see you here. It seems our paths cross quite often these days.

Diego: Surprise is good sometimes, isn't it? I was actually on my way to grab a coffee and stretch before heading to the oak tree for our AI meeting with Andy and Noor. Would you like to join me?

Samantha: That sounds like a great idea. Let's grab our coffees together at Caroline's Cafe, shall we? 9 AM sharp, as agreed?

Diego: Perfect! See you there then, Samantha. And don't forget to bring your noise-cancelling headphones if you want some peace during the coffee chat.

Samantha: You always know just how to make things comfortable for me. I wouldn't have it any other way.
Talked to Mei at museum around 2025-11-28 02:00

Samantha: (taking off her noise-cancelling headphones) Hey Mei, I didn't expect to see you here so early. I was just admiring the exhibit.

Mei: (smiling and gesturing towards a display) Oh, I couldn't resist coming in before the zine club meeting today. It seemed fitting to get some inspiration for our next issue. How about we grab coffee together later? Perhaps at Caroline's Café around 3 PM tomorrow?

Samantha: That sounds lovely. I'll bring my notebook for brainstorming on our AI project, and perhaps you can share some seeds from your garden. See you there then!

Mei: Agreed. It will be a pleasure to catch up and discuss our ideas in more detail. Looking forward to it!
Talked to Peter at theater around 2025-11-28 06:00

Samantha: Hey Peter, I didn't expect to see you here so early. We met at the park yesterday, right?

Peter: Indeed we did! Caroline mentioned our AI music project meeting today under that oak tree, and I couldn't resist stopping by for a sneak peek of the theater beforehand.

Samantha: Fancy meeting you here! Shall we grab coffee at Caroline's Cafe as planned? It's almost 9 AM, so let's make it sharp. How about meeting there in an hour, say 7 o'clock?

Peter: Sounds perfect, Samantha. I'll see you then!

(Their upcoming scheduled appointment is 2025-11-28 07:00 @ Caroline's Cafe)
Talked to Mei at hospital around 2025-11-28 07:00

Samantha (approaching Mei at Caroline's Cafe): "Hi Mei, I see you have your usual spot. Fancy meeting you here."

Mei (smiling): "Samantha! Just like you, I find comfort in routines. How has the AI project been progressing?"

Samantha: "It's coming along nicely. We're meeting again on the 4th at Caroline's before our usual oak tree gathering."

Mei: "Ah, yes! I'll make sure to be there. Let's also catch up outside of that. How about we meet here next Saturday at noon?"

Samantha: "That sounds perfect, Mei. See you then."

memory.summary:
On November 27th, Caroline organizes several meetings regarding their AI project at her café. This includes a meeting with Andy under an oak tree near the café on November 28th at noon, as well as Mei's rescheduled meeting and Samantha's meeting, both still scheduled for November 28th. Additionally, Caroline invites Noor for a catch-up about the AI project at the café on the same day at 3 PM, which Noor accepts, bringing her laptop and some snacks for students.

On the same day, Caroline speaks with Peter at a restaurant around 8 PM. During their conversation, they discuss arranging a meeting for their AI project on November 28th under the oak tree near the café with Samantha and Noor as well. Peter agrees to this arrangement, and they also plan to have a dinner date next week.

data.content: Talked to Mei at home around 2025-11-27 21:00

Caroline: "Mei, it's so great to see you! I've been meaning to catch up about our AI project and the community garden. How about we meet here at the cafe tomorrow at 1 PM? I can reserve a cozy corner for us."

Mei: "That sounds perfect, Caroline! And speaking of the garden, let's discuss our zine club plans too. I was thinking we could have that meeting on Saturday at the park as usual, and perhaps grab some vegan street tacos beforehand?"

Caroline: "Vegan street tacos sound delicious! Let's do it. See you tomorrow at 1 PM then, and Leo and I will join you at the park this weekend."

Caroline: "I sure do! It would be wonderful to catch up over lunch then and discuss plans for our zine club. I'll set aside a cozy corner for us under the oak tree in the café, just like old times."

Caroline: That's wonderful, Noor! I'll make sure to have your usual latte ready for you. See you at 3 PM sharp then!

memory.summary:
On November 27th, Peter and Caroline continue their discussions about an upcoming AI project meeting on the 28th at Caroline's Café. They make plans for an early coffee discussion under an oak tree with Noor, Mei, Samantha, and Diego before the official meeting. Peter invites Andy to join this pre-meeting discussion. Later in the evening, Peter communicates with Andy about their impending meeting at Caroline's Café. Andy agrees to meet early and mentions he is also attending the project meeting. They arrange to have a discussion under an oak tree at noon before the official 2 PM meeting.

Peter has a conversation with Diego at the town hall on the 28th, where they discuss their plans for the upcoming AI project meeting. During this exchange, Peter informs Diego that Andy will also be present and that they've agreed to meet under an oak tree at noon before the official 2 PM meeting. Diego confirms his attendance and suggests making it official. They both agree to meet at noon and 2 PM on Monday, with plans for a potential catch-up after their meetings, if time permits.

data.content: Talked to Diego at restaurant around 2025-11-28 02:00

Peter: Hey Diego, good to see you again! I hope your knee's been holding up since our last run together.

Diego: Hi Peter, it's been a while! Yeah, my knee is getting there. I've been focusing on stretching and taking care of it. How have things been with the AI project?

Peter: It's coming along nicely. We had a productive meeting with Samantha, Noor, and Andy at Caroline's Café yesterday. We decided to meet up here today to discuss our plans further before heading to Street Taco Cafe for lunch. Speaking of which, shall we grab some street tacos after our discussion?

Diego: That sounds great! Let's catch up on the project and grab some food afterward. How about we meet again next Tuesday at 3 PM at Caroline's Café to discuss further?

Peter: Perfect! See you then. And don't forget to bring your new ideas for our AI music project.

Diego: You got it, Peter. Looking forward to it!

Peter: (laughs) Yeah, you could say that. And speaking of which, we have a coffee date scheduled tomorrow under that oak tree at 3 PM. Remember our little project meeting?

Leo: Of course! Looking forward to it. Shall we grab a bite afterward at Street Taco Cafe as planned?

Peter: Absolutely. And maybe discuss my solo gallery show aspirations too, if you don't mind?

Leo: Sounds great, Peter. I'd love to hear more about your artistic endeavors. Let's make it 4 PM then, to accommodate the extra conversation.

Peter: Perfect! See you tomorrow, Leo.

Leo: Same time, same place, Peter. Take care.

Peter: Hey Mei, looks like our paths crossed again. I didn't expect to see you here so early.

Mei: Hi Peter! Yes, I've got a few meetings at Caroline's Café today regarding the AI project and community garden. You remember Diego, right? He suggested we expand the discussions to include you as well. How about joining us for lunch there around 1 PM today?

Peter: That sounds great! It'll give us more time to discuss your musical project and the collaboration with Samantha too. Let me check my schedule, but I think I can make it work.

Mei: Perfect! Looking forward to seeing you then. And don't forget to bring some seeds from your garden if you have any. We could exchange them during our discussion.

Samantha: Fancy meeting you here! Shall we grab coffee at Caroline's Cafe as planned? It's almost 9 AM, so let's make it sharp. How about meeting there in an hour, say 7 o'clock?

Peter: Sounds perfect, Samantha. I'll see you then!

(Their upcoming scheduled appointment is 2025-11-28 07:00 @ Caroline's Cafe)

Caroline: Hi Peter, I didn't expect to see you here so early! I was just setting up for the day. How about that AI project we've been discussing?

Peter: Hey Caroline! Surprise runs in our relationship, doesn't it? (laughs) Yeah, I'd love to discuss it further. I've been thinking about our meeting under the oak tree tomorrow at 1 PM sharp. How does that sound?

Caroline: That works perfectly for me. Let's make sure to bring everyone and everything we need then! Looking forward to it.

agents.name: Mei

memory.summary: The updated plans for meetings include an AI project discussion and community garden planning at Caroline's Café on November 27th at 1 PM. Due to a knee injury, Diego is now available to join this meeting at 1 PM sharp, requesting a cozy corner table. Mei proposes discussing the zine club plans over some vegan street tacos afterward, which Diego agrees to at 2 PM. Both parties look forward to these discussions and events, with Mei also planning to share seeds from her garden during meetings. Their revised schedules now include these updated meeting times for both Mei and Diego on November 27th.

data.content: Talked to Caroline at market around 2025-11-28 01:00

Caroline: "Hey Mei, I've saved you a spot for our AI discussion tomorrow at 1 PM sharp. Did Andy mention Diego will join us too? I hope everything is going well with your zine club."

Mei: "Thank you, Caroline! Yes, Diego will be there. We're making great progress on the project and I can't wait to share some seeds from my garden during our meeting. And speaking of which, do you have any plans for a seed exchange at the park on October 14th?"

Caroline: "I sure do! It would be wonderful to catch up over lunch then and discuss plans for our zine club. I'll set aside a cozy corner for us under the oak tree in the café, just like old times."
Talked to Samantha at museum around 2025-11-28 02:00

Samantha: (taking off her noise-cancelling headphones) Hey Mei, I didn't expect to see you here so early. I was just admiring the exhibit.

Mei: (smiling and gesturing towards a display) Oh, I couldn't resist coming in before the zine club meeting today. It seemed fitting to get some inspiration for our next issue. How about we grab coffee together later? Perhaps at Caroline's Café around 3 PM tomorrow?

Samantha: That sounds lovely. I'll bring my notebook for brainstorming on our AI project, and perhaps you can share some seeds from your garden. See you there then!

Mei: Agreed. It will be a pleasure to catch up and discuss our ideas in more detail. Looking forward to it!
Talked to Andy at theater around 2025-11-28 04:00

Andy: Hey Mei, it looks like we're both free tomorrow at 3 PM. How about we meet at Caroline's Café? I heard they have a lovely ambiance, perfect for our discussions.

Mei: That sounds delightful, Andy! I was thinking the same. It'll give us enough time to talk about our AI project and the community garden plans. I've even brought some seeds from my garden for sharing. See you there tomorrow!
Talked to Peter at gym around 2025-11-28 05:00

Peter: Hey Mei, looks like our paths crossed again. I didn't expect to see you here so early.

Mei: Hi Peter! Yes, I've got a few meetings at Caroline's Café today regarding the AI project and community garden. You remember Diego, right? He suggested we expand the discussions to include you as well. How about joining us for lunch there around 1 PM today?

Peter: That sounds great! It'll give us more time to discuss your musical project and the collaboration with Samantha too. Let me check my schedule, but I think I can make it work.

Mei: Perfect! Looking forward to seeing you then. And don't forget to bring some seeds from your garden if you have any. We could exchange them during our discussion.
Talked to Samantha at hospital around 2025-11-28 07:00

Samantha (approaching Mei at Caroline's Cafe): "Hi Mei, I see you have your usual spot. Fancy meeting you here."

Mei (smiling): "Samantha! Just like you, I find comfort in routines. How has the AI project been progressing?"

Samantha: "It's coming along nicely. We're meeting again on the 4th at Caroline's before our usual oak tree gathering."

Mei: "Ah, yes! I'll make sure to be there. Let's also catch up outside of that. How about we meet here next Saturday at noon?"

Samantha: "That sounds perfect, Mei. See you then."
Talked to Leo at cafe around 2025-11-28 08:00

Mei: Hi Leo! It seems we've both got some shared interests coming up - the AI project and the zine club. How about we continue our discussion at Caroline's Café this upcoming Saturday, November 28th at exactly 10 AM?

Leo: That sounds like a great idea, Mei! I was actually planning to stop by the park for a bit of violin practice, but meeting earlier at the café would definitely be more productive. Let's meet at 9 AM instead, if that works for you. Looking forward to it!

memory.summary:
The human and Samantha meet at Caroline's Café on November 28th, 2025, at 9 AM, as planned. Diego invites her to join him for a coffee before their AI meeting with Andy and Noor, which is scheduled to take place near the oak tree. Samantha agrees to bring her noise-cancelling headphones for a comfortable conversation. The new scheduled event for Samantha is:
- Samantha: 2025-11-28/2025 09:00 @ cafe

data.content: Talked to Peter at town_hall around 2025-11-28 01:00

Peter: Hey Diego, great running into you here at the town hall. I hope your knee's doing better.

Diego: Hi Peter! Yeah, it's improving. So, looks like we're both attending that AI project meeting on Monday, right?

Peter: Indeed, at Caroline's Café at 2 PM sharp. Andy mentioned something about discussing our plans with Samantha and Noor beforehand too, under an oak tree around noon.

Diego: Ah yes, I remember that conversation. Sounds good to me. Let's make it official then – see you there on Monday at noon and 2 PM.

Peter: Perfect! Looking forward to it, Diego. And maybe we can grab a coffee or something after our meetings, if time permits?

Diego: That would be nice, Peter. Let's catch up then. See you on Monday.
Talked to Peter at restaurant around 2025-11-28 02:00

Peter: Hey Diego, good to see you again! I hope your knee's been holding up since our last run together.

Diego: Hi Peter, it's been a while! Yeah, my knee is getting there. I've been focusing on stretching and taking care of it. How have things been with the AI project?

Peter: It's coming along nicely. We had a productive meeting with Samantha, Noor, and Andy at Caroline's Café yesterday. We decided to meet up here today to discuss our plans further before heading to Street Taco Cafe for lunch. Speaking of which, shall we grab some street tacos after our discussion?

Diego: That sounds great! Let's catch up on the project and grab some food afterward. How about we meet again next Tuesday at 3 PM at Caroline's Café to discuss further?

Peter: Perfect! See you then. And don't forget to bring your new ideas for our AI music project.

Diego: You got it, Peter. Looking forward to it!
Talked to Noor at hospital around 2025-11-28 03:00

Diego: Hey Noor, great running into you at the hospital! I've been meaning to catch up about our AI projects. Mei suggested we meet tomorrow at Caroline's Café, specifically at 2 PM. What do you think?

Noor: Hi Diego! That sounds perfect! I was actually planning to grab some vegan street tacos there before our discussion with Leo and Andy. How about if we have lunch together first, then discuss our projects at 3 PM? Caroline said she'd like to join us as well for the AI project chat.

Diego: That works for me! I'll bring my laptop, and it would be great to exchange ideas. Let's meet under the oak tree at 2 PM for lunch, then head inside for our meeting at 3 PM. Sounds good?

Noor: Absolutely! I'll bring snacks for the students too. Looking forward to it! See you tomorrow.

Diego: Can't wait! And Noor, as a token of friendship, I brought some seeds from my garden. Let's plant them together in your school's garden sometime. Take care!

Noor: That's so thoughtful of you, Diego! I'd love that! See you tomorrow at Caroline's Café. Take care and take it easy on that knee!
Talked to Noor at gym around 2025-11-28 06:00

Diego: Hey Noor, great seeing you at the park! I was thinking about those AI projects we discussed yesterday. How about we grab some vegan street tacos and continue our discussion over lunch tomorrow at Caroline's Café, around 2 PM?

Noor: Absolutely, Diego! That sounds like a fantastic idea. Let's do it! And don't worry, I'll bring some snacks for the students as well. See you there tomorrow!

Diego: Perfect! Looking forward to it. By the way, let's aim for 2 PM sharp so we have enough time for an extended discussion. How does that sound?

Noor: That works great for me. Can't wait to catch up and share some exciting ideas! See you tomorrow at Caroline's Café at 2 PM sharp.

memory.summary: On November 27th, Noor had a conversation with both Caroline and Diego. Caroline invited Noor for a catch-up over coffee the following day at her café, which was now scheduled for November 28th at 2 PM. They also discussed Caroline's offer to help with the robotics club and her advocacy for better lab equipment, which Noor appreciated. Additionally, Noor agreed to meet Diego at Caroline's Café on the same day, shifting the meeting time to 1 PM due to a scheduling conflict. The meeting will now be a working lunch, during which they will discuss the AI project for the zine club, and they also plan to run through their duet. Noor looks forward to sharing updates on their collaboration with Diego.

memory.summary: On November 26th, Leo meets Andy at the gym and discusses their plans for discussing the AI project and personal matters over coffee the following day. Later in the evening, they decide to meet earlier for a vegan street food lunch at the park before their scheduled meeting, confirming the new time of 1 PM sharp under the oak tree. That same night, Leo talks to Noor at the train station around 21:00 hours. In this conversation, Noor proposes a change in location for their AI project discussion from Caroline's Café to the same café at 3 PM sharp on the following day. Additionally, Leo asks if Noor managed to get the snacks for the students, which she confirms. They also agree to catch up after the meeting, setting another appointment at the café at 4 PM sharp on November 27th.

data.content: Talked to Peter at hospital around 2025-11-26 22:00

Peter: Hey Leo, it's been a while! I didn't expect to see you here at the hospital. How are you?

Leo: Hey Peter, surprising isn't it? I'm doing well, thanks for asking. Just finished fixing the amp for the theater. What brings you here?

Peter: Well, I was meeting Diego about our AI project, and we rescheduled since you were also here. Turns out Noor is here too, so I thought I'd catch up with you while I'm at it. Fancy grabbing a coffee tomorrow at Caroline's Café at 3 PM sharp?

Leo: That works for me, Peter. Looking forward to catching up and discussing our AI project over coffee. See you then!
Talked to Caroline at restaurant around 2025-11-27 15:00

Caroline: "Leo! Just in time for our catch-up. You remember my latte art, I see you've been visiting."

Leo: "Of course, Caroline. The cozy vibe here is always a welcoming sight. And the cat behind the café seems to be waiting for me."

Caroline: "Ah yes, our feline friend. Well, let's catch up while I make us some coffee. How about we chat after your cat visit? It'll be 15:45 sharp?"

Leo: "That sounds perfect, Caroline. See you then."
Talked to Caroline at school around 2025-11-27 19:00

Caroline: "Hey Leo, I see you've become quite the regular here! Your violin melodies certainly make our cafe cozier."

Leo: "Well, Caroline, your latte art and warm conversations have me drawn in every time. And it seems we'll be seeing a lot more of each other with all these shared commitments."

Caroline: "Indeed! How about we grab a quick catch-up over coffee tomorrow at 1 PM? I believe Andy and Samantha will be here around the same time for our AI project discussions."

Leo: "That sounds perfect, Caroline. Looking forward to it!"
Talked to Caroline at home around 2025-11-28 02:00

Caroline: "Ah, Leo! Just in time for my afternoon break. Come, let's grab a latte before we catch up about our AI project."

Leo: "Perfect timing, Caroline. I was hoping to discuss the project with you today. Let's take that usual spot by the oak tree, and maybe we can even play a tune on my violin?"

Caroline: "Sounds delightful, Leo. How about we meet at 3 PM sharp? I have some commitments earlier in the afternoon."

Leo: "3 PM it is then. Looking forward to our catch-up, Caroline."
Talked to Peter at gym around 2025-11-28 04:00

Peter: Hey Leo, didn't expect to see you here so early! Running through your usual improvisation routine?

Leo: Funny you should mention that, Peter. I was just practicing a new piece for the birds. How about you? Still preaching fitness to the weights?

Peter: (laughs) Yeah, you could say that. And speaking of which, we have a coffee date scheduled tomorrow under that oak tree at 3 PM. Remember our little project meeting?

Leo: Of course! Looking forward to it. Shall we grab a bite afterward at Street Taco Cafe as planned?

Peter: Absolutely. And maybe discuss my solo gallery show aspirations too, if you don't mind?

Leo: Sounds great, Peter. I'd love to hear more about your artistic endeavors. Let's make it 4 PM then, to accommodate the extra conversation.

Peter: Perfect! See you tomorrow, Leo.

Leo: Same time, same place, Peter. Take care.
Talked to Mei at cafe around 2025-11-28 08:00

Mei: Hi Leo! It seems we've both got some shared interests coming up - the AI project and the zine club. How about we continue our discussion at Caroline's Café this upcoming Saturday, November 28th at exactly 10 AM?

Leo: That sounds like a great idea, Mei! I was actually planning to stop by the park for a bit of violin practice, but meeting earlier at the café would definitely be more productive. Let's meet at 9 AM instead, if that works for you. Looking forward to it!
